summary: Software engineer with 3+ years building **high-throughput, data-intensive production systems** at a global bank. Deep Python proficiency with hands-on experience designing and optimizing **real-time data pipelines** processing tens of millions of transactions daily. Strong **SQL** and data analysis skills, Cornell CS foundation in **statistics and algorithms**, and genuine interest in **equity markets and quantitative analytics**.

Bank of America: Designed and optimized **high-throughput data pipelines** processing tens of millions of OTC transactions daily across the firm's trade reporting platform.

Built a **reference-data framework**: pipeline of services via AMPS queues querying multiple external sources per trade event; handled retries, API calls, load balancing — extensible for new data sources.
Developed T+1 **UTI validation service** ensuring trade-ID uniqueness across counterparties with automated corrections; processed millions of transactions/day.
Parallelized and **automated a formerly manual** backreporting process, delivering large speed and throughput gains.
Built transformer service (internal model → outgoing XML) and **DTCC response parser** to update transaction status in real time.
Wrote Python/Pandas scripts to scrape, clean, and **analyze 50-100GB datasets** for trade reconciliation and reporting insights.
Microsoft: Processed and analyzed large datasets in Python/Pandas used to train ML models; wrote data-cleaning and reporting scripts.

Market Data Dashboard.desc: Pulls **equity and crypto market data** (open interest, funding rates, price) from exchange APIs; stores in **Postgres**, visualizes in **Grafana** dashboards with configurable SMS alerts on signal triggers via Twilio.

Polymarket Scanner.desc: Scans prediction markets for **large trades and unusual activity patterns**; applies signal detection logic and alerts to Discord for real-time monitoring.

Benchmark Agency Platform.desc: Multi-tenant **financial-intelligence dashboard** (revenue trends, equipment P&L, staff comp, AI-generated recommendations) with row-level security. Built lead-gen **data pipeline** (8 idempotent stages, 20 tests) discovering businesses via Google Places API and scoring via LLM.

bullets: CUAIR (Cornell Unmanned Aircraft) — autonomous systems with obstacle avoidance, object classification; top team at AUVSI SUAS.
